item.title: mlverney: Michael Verney @mlverney · 13s Route one 0:34 De Cahair O'Kane
item.description: Michael Verney @mlverney · 13s Route one 0:34 De Cahair O'Kane

item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 1min The Munster Hurling Championship starts with a band on Sunday on RTÉ TV. Clare and
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 1min The Munster Hurling Championship starts with a band on Sunday on RTÉ TV. Clare and Waterford are in action at Páirc Chíosóg and the Semple Stadium meeting of Tipperary and Cork are both live on RTÉ2 from 1.30pm. #RTEGAA #SundayGame 91

item.title:
clubber: Clubber @clubber · 4min Is that the insurance score for @deisecamogie
Beth Carton with an absolute stunner for the D

BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 10min Some Ulster SFC action coming up
Watch live on BBC iPlayer and on BBC Two NI from 16:
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 10min Some Ulster SFC action coming up
Watch live on BBC iPlayer and on BBC Two NI from 16:40 BST
Plus, live text commentary on the BBC Sport website and app
#BBCGAA 1 318
